name: wp-rig/signup-form
title: Signup Form
description: WooCommerce customer registration form with customizable consent text and legal page links.

marketingTitle.default: Sign me up to hear more from Eternal Labs.

marketingDescription.default: By checking this box, you agree to receive marketing emails and other communications from Eternal Labs. To learn more, view our PRIVACY POLICY.

termsAgreementText.default: By clicking Create Account button I agree to ETERNAL-LABS TERMS & CONDITIONS and PRIVACY POLICY.
